# Kindora NextJS CMS Customizations

globs:
  - components/hero/**
  - components/menu/**
  - components/footer/**
  - pages/**
  - styles/**

Instructions:
You are working on a Kindora CMS website using NextJS. Focus on customizing the hero banner, menu navigation, and footer components.

- Hero component is located under components/hero or similar folder. Adjust content, layout, images as per project requirements.
- Menu component controls site navigation. You can update links, dropdowns, styles within components/menu or similar.
- Footer component includes links and contact info, located under components/footer. Update copyright and social links.
- The project uses TailwindCSS for styling, so modify classes accordingly.
- The site uses NextJS 15, React 19 and common libraries like react-icons, aos, swiper for animations and UI effects.
- Use page-level components inside pages/ folder for page-specific hero or banners.
- Remember to keep the component reusability and clean code practices during customization.

Libraries:
react
next
tailwindcss
react-icons
aos
swiper
